heading: Create a stream processing workspace
body:
To create a new stream processing workspace:**Create-spi-cli:**Atlas CLITo create one stream processing workspace in the project you specify using the
Atlas CLI, run the following command:```sh

atlas api streams createStreamWorkspace [options]

```To learn more about the command syntax and parameters, see the
Atlas CLI documentation for [atlas api streams createStreamWorkspace](atlas/cli/current/command/atlas-api-streams-createStreamWorkspace).**Create-spi-ui:**Atlas UI* Click Create workspace in the upper
  right corner.

* Configure your new stream processing workspace.

  - Select a default tier.

  - Select a Cloud Provider.

  - Select a Region from the dropdown menu.

  - Enter a string for the Workspace Name. Each
    stream processing workspace name must be unique within a project.

  - (Optional) Set a max tier size.

  To learn more about default tier and max tier sizes, see [Considerations](atlas-sp-default-tier-spw).

* Click Create.**Create-spi-api:**Atlas Administration APIThe Atlas Administration API provides an endpoint for creating a
stream processing workspace.[Create One Stream Workspace](api/doc/atlas-admin-api-v2/operation/operation-creategroupstreamworkspace)
